P:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\GtestTests.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\GtestTests.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\GtestTests.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -static -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\GtestTests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\Users\ED\Documents\My_Programs\Great_Project\search_engine\tests\GtestTests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libGtestTests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\GtestTests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
